name.ja: <ruby>邪<rt>じゃ</rt></ruby><ruby>悪<rt>あく</rt></ruby>なる<ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt>おう</rt></ruby>－ゾーク

text.en:
You can discard 2 cards, including this card; add 1 Level 8 Fiend monster from your Deck to your hand. When your Fiend monster is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your GY. During your Main Phase: You can roll a six-sided die and apply this effect based on the result.
● 1, 2, 3, or 4: Take control of, or destroy, 1 monster your opponent controls.
● 5 or 6: Destroy 1 card you control.
You can only use each effect of "Evil Lord - Zorc" once per turn.
